summary: The frozen 347 eligibility evaluation does not carry a dedicated timingGuardrailRef for the minor_illness_fallback lane.

temporaryRuntimePolicy.rule: When the active evaluation does not expose a timingGuardrailRef, 348 derives the most conservative currently-compiled guardrail by selecting the guardrail with the smallest maxRecommendedDelayMinutes and binds discovery and ranking to that fallback guardrail.
temporaryRuntimePolicy.safetyReason: This fails closed for late options and prevents relaxed fallback ranking from silently widening the visible frontier.

requiredClosure.neededChange: Publish an explicit minor-illness lane timing guardrail contract or bind one directly in the eligibility output family so downstream tracks do not rely on inference.
